ideation: This animation sequence mimics the action of someone leaning in to carefully examine an 8-ball. It starts with both arms relaxed at the sides, then moves to a position with both arms slightly raised and angled inward, as if the robot is peering intently at the ball. Finally, both arms return to a relaxed position.  This emphasizes the contemplative nature of the emoji. The movement is slow and deliberate, reflecting the concentration required for evaluating the 8-ball.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to observe
both arms lift slightly, leaning in to examine
arms return to rest, the observation complete
